---
name: impact-assessment
description: Use when analyzing what a change affects across requirements design code tests release readiness and operational procedures.
---

# Impact Assessment

Use this skill before major design changes, bug fixes with unclear blast radius, or release decisions.

Assess impact across:

- KB artifacts
- code modules
- tests
- configuration
- migrations and deployment
- user-facing behavior

Minimum output:

- impacted files or subsystems
- acceptance criteria affected
- tests to add or rerun
- release or migration implications
- documentation or KB deltas required
